title: assets.json — the ingested drop-folder catalog (videos/<project>/work/assets.json)
description: Content-addressed catalog of everything ingested from videos/<project>/drop/. One entry per unique sha256. Feeds the classifier confirm-chips, the script<->VO aligner, and the edit-plan asset matcher. Mirrors the versions philosophy: content-addressed identity, provenance recorded, nothing overwritten. Written by tools/ingest_drop.py, updated by the library confirm-chip endpoint. Stdlib+ffprobe only; NO AI in this file.

drop_dir.description: Relative to project dir, always videos/<project>/drop

counts.description: Denormalized tallies for the top-bar ingest chip; recomputed on every write, never authoritative.

sha256.description: Identity. Two files with the same bytes are ONE asset (dedupe); the extra path is recorded under source.duplicate_of / aliases.

drop_path.description: Path as dropped, relative to drop_dir, e.g. broll/03-dashboard-pan.mp4. Preserves the owner's folder structure verbatim.

aliases.description: Other drop_paths with identical bytes (dedupe collisions). Empty unless duplicated.

class.description: Classifier verdict. script=structured prose w/ headings/beats; notes=unstructured text; voiceover=speech-band mono-ish long audio; music=stereo spectral-spread audio; broll=camera clip; screencast=screen capture (UI res/fps/low-motion tells); image=still; brand_asset=logo/wordmark/lower-third-ish (alpha, small, in a brand/ or logos/ folder); unknown=below the confirm floor.

confidence_tier.description: high (>=0.85) auto-files silently; medium (0.6-0.85) files but shows a soft confirm chip; low (<0.6) => class often 'unknown', REQUIRES a one-click confirm chip in the library. Never silently guess a low-confidence class.

class_runner_up.description: The second-best class + score, so the confirm chip offers the likely alternative as one tap.

signals.description: The raw evidence the classifier used, kept so a human (or a later smarter classifier) can audit the verdict. All optional; populated per media kind.

speech_band_ratio.description: audio: fraction of energy in 300-3400 Hz; high => voice

silence_ratio.description: audio: VO has speech-gap pauses; music is continuous

fps.description: exact fraction e.g. 30/1; whole-integer low fps + exact desktop res => screencast

is_exact_display_res.description: matches a common desktop/window resolution => screencast tell

motion_score.description: video: mean inter-frame delta on sampled frames; low+desktop-res => screencast, high => broll

text_structure.description: text files: cheap structure probe that separates script from notes

prose_ratio.description: fraction of lines that are full sentences vs fragments

tags.description: Free tags used by the matcher's token overlap. AUTO-DERIVED (never required from the owner): folder names become tags (drop/broll/ => 'broll'; drop/dashboard/ => 'dashboard'), filename tokens split on separators (03-dashboard-pan => ['dashboard','pan']), numeric prefixes stripped into order_hint. Owner-added tags via confirm chip append here.

order_hint.description: Parsed from a leading numeric prefix (03-... => 3). A soft hint to scene ordering / matching; NEVER required and never authoritative.

status.description: new=just ingested, awaiting classify commit; filed=classified + placed, available to the matcher; used=referenced by >=1 approved scene; rejected=owner dismissed (kept for dedupe, hidden from matcher).

filed_to.description: Canonical resting path after ingest, relative to project dir. Convention: work/library/<class>/<sha8>-<slug><ext>. VO/script also copied to their pipeline homes (see notes). null until filed.

conformed.description: For clips that will hit bake: the comp-native rendition (1080p, comp fps, 8-bit H.264, aac) produced by ingest-conform, content-addressed like a take. Absent for stills/audio/text.

referenced_by.description: Scene ids in edit-plan.json / timeline.json that use this asset. Drives the `used` status and safe-delete. Empty => orphan, safe to prune.

roles.description: How the planner may use this asset. e.g. the picked VO take gets primary_vo; a wide calm b-roll clip earns base_track_candidate (the VO-mode master base layer).
